candidate_summary: PERMAFROST-PARAM: 3-tier access-gated parameter memory FP32/INT8/FP4 + stabilizer anchor
rule: hit iff kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7

rejudge_results.note: Source-domain reference; permafrost ecology, no LLM relevance.
AWQ uniform activation-aware quantization; not tiered, not access-frequency-gated.
GPTQ 4-bit PTQ; uniform per-layer, lacks tier hierarchy and access gating.
3-tier hot/warm/cold mixed-precision access-frequency-gated weight storage — direct mechanism match.
LMCache is external KV cache for cross-request reuse; not parameter tiering, not weight quantization.
Per-weight access-frequency-gated mixed-precision; matches the gating + precision-tier mechanism.
Tiered parameter cold storage with stabilizer-anchor weights — matches both tiering and iron-mineral-anchor analog.
Cryogenic Permafrost-Inspired LLM weight tiering — identical metaphor and mechanism.

calibration_check: PASS — all 7 anchor papers fall within prescribed functional score ranges; deviations between original and re-judge scores are <=0.05 across the board.
verdict: NOT NOVEL — confirmed. Four independent functional/semantic matches (ranks 4, 6, 7, 8), including one near-identical permafrost-inspired tiering paper (rank 8, func 0.95) and one explicit stabilizer-anchor + tiered parameter storage paper (rank 7, func 0.9). Multi-cluster match across 4 distinct effect clusters confirms PERMAFROST-PARAM is dominated by existing 2025-2026 literature on access-frequency-gated tiered weight storage.
